home.heroSubtitle: Swiss digital studio. Design, development and hosting on a monthly subscription. No setup fees, no commitment.
home.metric1Label: Average delivery time, from brief to launch
home.metric2Label: Average Lighthouse score across all our deliveries
home.metric3Label: Average conversion rate improvement observed across our clients
home.testimonialQuote: The site was delivered in 36 hours, with a conversion rate higher than the one we had built over four months. The quality-price-speed ratio has no equivalent on the Swiss market.
home.ctaFinalBody: A few questions to scope your project. We get back to you within 24 business hours.

about.heroLine: We design websites that fund their own subscription.
about.manifestoP1: The Swiss web market lacks transparency. Quotes of 15,000 CHF for sites built on generic templates, multi-month timelines for features deliverable in days, services billed without clear visibility on what is actually produced.
about.manifestoP2: Tourbillon Studios was founded to offer an alternative. Our belief: a website is a commercial tool, not a work of art. It must be delivered quickly, convert visitors into clients, and represent a justified investment.
about.manifestoP3: Our commitment: 48 hours from quote signature to launch. A single monthly price, no setup fees, no fixed-term contract. If we miss the deadline, your first month is on us.

process.heroSubtitle: Four structured steps, a contractually guaranteed deadline, your first month free if we miss it.
process.step1Description: Scoping video call. We define your objectives, audience, available content and existing visual identity together. You leave with a written recap and a precise schedule.
process.step2Description: Architecture, design and integration. You follow the progress live on a private URL. No intermediate meetings: we build, you watch.
process.step3Description: You receive the final URL. Test on your devices, browsers, with your content. Approval or list of refinements to apply.
process.step4Description: One week to adjust what needs adjusting: text, colors, structure. All refinements are included in the subscription, with no limit.
process.guaranteeTitle: Missed the deadline? First month on us.
process.guaranteeBody: We meet this deadline on 99 % of our Starter and Pro projects. When we don't, the commitment stands: the first month is on us, no conditions.
process.faqQ1: What happens if my content isn't ready?
process.faqA1: We can write the copy for you, as an option. Otherwise, we use placeholder content that we replace during the refinement period. The 48-hour deadline is only guaranteed if essential content is provided at the brief.
process.faqA2: Custom projects (web applications, advanced e-commerce) naturally exceed the 48-hour scope. We communicate a tailored deadline after the brief, generally between one and four weeks.
process.faqQ3: What happens during the 36 hours of build?
process.faqA3: The team develops. You access the private URL and follow the build section by section. No intermediate slides, no wireframe meetings: real code from the first hour.
process.faqQ4: Can I change direction along the way?
process.faqA4: During the refinement week, yes. During the 36 hours of build, no · that is what enables us to hold the deadline. The brief remains the decisive moment.

pricing.heroSubtitle: No setup fees. Cancel anytime. The source code is yours.
pricing.vatNote: Excluding Swiss VAT. Minimum commitment of one month.
pricing.ownershipBody: Whatever plan you choose, in case of cancellation we provide you with a complete source code archive. You remain free to host it elsewhere or entrust maintenance to another provider.
pricing.roiBody: A quick simulation to visualise what a site converting at +34 % can generate for your business.
pricing.roiResultNote: Estimate based on an average +34 % conversion rate improvement observed across all our projects.

work.heroSubtitle: A selection of cases where our clients measured tangible returns in under 90 days.

contact.heroSubtitle: First exchange is free, reply within 24 business hours. If you have already identified the plan that suits you, feel free to mention it directly.
contact.name: Full name
contact.messagePlaceholder: Briefly introduce your activity, your goals and your expectations for this site.
contact.successText: We get back to you within 24 business hours at the provided address. For any urgent matter, you can write to us directly at contact@tourbillonstudios.ch.

footer.tagline: Swiss digital studio. Professional websites delivered in 48 hours, on a monthly subscription.
